mnemonics.title: CAP Theorem
mnemonics.content: CAP = Choose 2: Consistency, Availability, Partition Tolerance. Remember as 'Can't Avoid Partitions'

acronyms.usage: Used in eventually consistent systems for conflict resolution

visualTips.visualization: Imagine library books divided into sections (shards) across multiple buildings

analogies.analogy: Like multiple stopwatches tracking different event sequences in a relay race
